recommendedDns.note: Use CNAME flattening for apex domains if DNS is not already managed by Cloudflare.

gitIntegration.summary: Cloudflare API reported an internal issue with the account's Cloudflare Pages Git installation while creating a Git-integrated project.
gitIntegration.recovery: Reinstall or repair the Cloudflare Pages GitHub App integration, then rerun the Git-integrated create-cloudflare-project step if Git deployments are required.

externalActions: Wait for Cloudflare Pages custom-domain validation status to refresh from pending to active for 100daysatsea.net.
Repair/reinstall the Cloudflare Pages GitHub integration if automatic Git deployments are required.
notes: Cloudflare and GitHub secrets were read from local environment only and were not written to this report.
Direct upload was used because Cloudflare's Git-integrated Pages project creation failed with Git installation error 8000011.
The GitHub repository remains the source of truth for site code.
After the CNAME was added, https://100daysatsea.net returned HTTP 200 and http://100daysatsea.net redirected to HTTPS.
The customer-provided effectivecpmnetwork script is installed through a hostname gate and only loads when window.location.hostname is exactly 100daysatsea.net.
Cloudflare direct upload redeployed the ad-script build to https://b535d606.100-days-at-sea-git.pages.dev.

Added Google Search Console HTML meta verification for 100daysatsea.net and redeployed to https://dc7a0176.100-days-at-sea-git.pages.dev. Live homepage source contains the google-site-verification meta tag.
